raw_text:
[PAGE 2]
VALMIKI RAMAYANA
BALA KANDA
CHAPTER 2: The Birth of Verse

1. Valmiki went to the banks of the river Tamasa. He beheld a pair of Krauncha birds singing sweetly.
2. Suddenly, a wicked hunter killed the male bird. Seeing the female bird wail in grief, Valmiki was moved to deep compassion and uttered: 'Ma Nishada...' - which became the first verse (shloka) of literature.
